goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'taj tandoori'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '6 people' at '17:30' on 'monday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should include free parking
The hotel should include free wifi
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called taj tandoori
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 17:30 on monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
